notifications.description: Configure channels for receiving task alerts and reminders.

notifications.testDescription: Send a test message to this channel.

settings.usersManagerDescription: Create and manage user accounts and assign roles.
settings.groupsManagerDescription: Create groups to organize users and permissions.
settings.updatesDescription: Review the installed version and trigger a fresh remote check when needed.
settings.updatesAccessDescription: Update checks are only available to managers and super-admins.
settings.updatesRefreshError: Unable to trigger a fresh update check.
settings.updatesSourceHint: The official source is selected automatically based on the deployment mode.
settings.updatesErrorDescription: The backend could not verify updates. Check connectivity to GitHub or Docker Hub.
settings.updatesReloadDescription: The backend version changed since this page was loaded.
settings.feedbackDescription: Send us your suggestions or report a bug directly to GitHub.

generalSettings.countryRegionDescription: Used for holidays, date formatting, and week start rules
generalSettings.derivedRulesDescription: These settings are automatically determined by your selected country
generalSettings.publicHolidaysPreviewDescription: These holidays are used to shift tasks when "Skip Holidays" is enabled
generalSettings.holidaysApiNotImplementedDescription: The backend endpoint GET /api/holidays needs to be implemented to display holidays data.
generalSettings.noHolidaysData: No holidays data available for {{country}} in {{year}}
generalSettings.schedulingDefaultsDescription: Configure the global default time windows used for daily task execution
generalSettings.defaultStartTimeDescription: The globally applied start time for tasks
generalSettings.defaultEndTimeDescription: The globally applied end time for tasks
generalSettings.startTimeBeforeEnd: Start time must be before end time
generalSettings.endTimeAfterStart: End time must be after start time
generalSettings.appearanceDescription: Customize the look and feel of the application
generalSettings.brandingDescription: Customize your application's visual identity and naming

authSettings.externalProvidersNote: External authentication providers allow users to sign in with their organizational accounts. Local authentication will remain available as a fallback.
authSettings.azureDescription: Configure Azure AD / Microsoft Entra ID authentication
authSettings.filterHint: Use {{username}} as placeholder for the username

authPage.cannotEnableEmailOtpDisabled: The Email feature is disabled. Enable it in Email Settings first.
authPage.cannotEnableEmailOtpNotConfigured: Email is enabled but not properly configured. Complete the configuration in Email Settings.
authPage.readOnlyCapabilitiesError: Cannot save settings while capabilities are unavailable. Read-only mode is active.
authPage.notImplementedYet: {{provider}} is not yet implemented in this version.
authPage.configureRequiredFieldsFirst: Please configure all required fields first for {{provider}}.

testResult.timeoutDescription: The connection timed out after 5 seconds

authPage.validationFailedDescription: Check the following tabs/fields for errors: {{fields}}
authPage.informationDescription: External identity providers allow users to sign in with their organization accounts. Local authentication remains available as a fallback unless explicitly disabled.
authPage.connectionErrorDescription: Failed to verify authentication capabilities with the server. Settings have been locked in read-only mode to prevent invalid configurations.

tooltips.azure: For Microsoft 365 and Azure Active Directory accounts
tooltips.google: For Google Workspace accounts with optional domain restriction
tooltips.oidc: For custom OpenID Connect providers (Keycloak, Okta, Auth0, etc.) or enterprise SAML 2.0
tooltips.ldap: For Active Directory and OpenLDAP directory services

azure.title: Azure Active Directory
azure.description: Allow users to sign in with Microsoft Entra ID accounts
azure.requiredFields: Please complete all required fields (Tenant ID, Client ID, Secret) to activate this provider.

google.title: Google Workspace
google.description: Allow users to sign in with Google Workspace accounts
google.requiredFields: Please complete required fields (Client ID, Secret).

generic.title: Generic Identity Provider
generic.description: Connect via OpenID Connect (OIDC) or SAML 2.0 protocol
generic.requiredFields: Please complete all required fields for {{protocol}}.

ldap.title: LDAP / Active Directory
ldap.description: Connect to legacy Active Directory or OpenLDAP
ldap.requiredFields: Please complete required fields (URL, Bind DN, Password, Search Base).

authPage.hostedDomainDescription: Restrict login to a specific Google Workspace domain
authPage.providerNameDescription: Display name shown on the login button
authPage.mfaPolicyDescription: Determine who must use Multi-Factor Authentication

disabled.title: Disabled
disabled.description: MFA is completely disabled. Users cannot configure it.

optional.title: Optional (Users may enable)
optional.description: Recommended. Users can choose to enable MFA from their profile.

required.title: Required for all users
required.description: All users must set up MFA to access the system. Good for high security.

authPage.passkeysDescription: Allow users to sign in using biometrics (FaceID, TouchID) or security keys (YubiKey). Recommended for modern browsers and high-security environments.
authPage.passkeysInfo: Passkeys will be available to all users. Users must register them from their profile before they can be used.
authPage.passwordFallbackDescription: Password-based authentication remains available to prevent lockouts. This behavior cannot be disabled.
authPage.accessRequirementsDisabled: Enable MFA or Passkeys to configure access requirements for different roles.

roles.administratorsDescription: Full system access and configuration rights
roles.usersDescription: Regular users with task management access

authPage.nextLoginPrompt: Users will be prompted to set up required authentication methods on their next login.
authPage.sessionPoliciesDescription: Control how long users stay logged in and when they must re-authenticate.
authPage.secureActionsDescription: Require re-authentication for sensitive actions (e.g. changing password, updating security settings)

emailSettings.globalToggleDescription: Master switch for all email features
emailSettings.saveBeforeTest: Please save your settings before testing the connection.
emailSettings.testEmailDescription: Send a test email to verify the configuration.

email.missingTasksDescription: Send alerts when tasks are missing (checked every 15 minutes)
email.remindersDescription: Send reminders before task deadlines (checked every 10 minutes)

export.exportDescription: Schedule automatic exports and email delivery
export.cronHint: Format: minute hour day month weekday (e.g., "0 0 * * *" = daily at midnight)
export.retentionHint: Export files older than this will be automatically deleted
export.manualDescription: Generate an export file on demand

backup.importantNote: Backups include all database data (tasks, users, settings). Store them securely and verify regularly.
backup.cronHint: Format: minute hour day month weekday (e.g., "0 3 * * *" = daily at 3 AM)
backup.retentionHint: Backup files older than this will be automatically deleted

backupModal.title: Run Manual Backup
backupModal.description: Trigger an immediate backup. This will be saved to the server history.
backupModal.databaseDescription: Fast. Includes all application data and users.
backupModal.systemDescription: Includes Database + Config + Uploaded Files + Secrets.
backupModal.disabledMissingKey: Backups are disabled because BACKUP_ENCRYPTION_KEY is missing.

backupHistory.title: System Backups ({{count}})
backupHistory.saveConfigurationFirst: Please save your configuration changes before running a backup.
backupHistory.emptyDescription: Run a manual backup or check your storage configuration.
backupHistory.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete backup {{filename}}?

defaultEncryptionKeyWarning.middle: ) is currently set to an insecure default value. All of your encrypted backups are vulnerable.
defaultEncryptionKeyWarning.strong: Please generate a new random key of at least 32 characters in your .env file

backupPage.unsavedChangesDescription: You have modified backup configurations. Please save before running manual backups.

backupSchedule.title: Automatic Backup Schedule
backupSchedule.encryptionEnabledDescription: All automatic backups are encrypted using the server-side key (BACKUP_ENCRYPTION_KEY). You do not need to manage passwords manually for scheduled jobs.

importBackupModal.title: Import Backup File
importBackupModal.description: Upload an existing backup file (.enc, .tar.gz) to add it to the history. You can restore from it after import.
importBackupModal.noteDescription: This does NOT restore the system immediately. It just adds the file to your backup list.

exportSection.title: Business Data Export
exportSection.description: Export portable business data (Users, Tasks, Groups) for analysis or migration.
exportSection.warning: Not a full system backup. Does not include configuration or secrets.
exportSection.informationDescription: Exports are generated on demand and are not encrypted by default as they contain no system secrets.

exportSettings.incompleteConfigurationDescription: Automatic exports are enabled but the configuration is incomplete. Please select at least one export format.
exportSettings.automaticExportsDescription: Automatically generate exports on a schedule
exportSettings.dataRangeDescription: Define the date range for exported data
exportSettings.destinationDescription: Where exports are stored on the server
exportSettings.exportDirectoryHint: Path on the server filesystem. Files are stored here and accessible via the download API.
exportSettings.emailFeatureDisabledDescription: Enable the email feature in Email Settings to send exports by email.
exportSettings.emailNotConfiguredDescription: Email is enabled but not properly configured. Please configure your email provider in Email Settings.
exportSettings.retentionFilesDescription: Files older than this will be automatically deleted during cleanup.
exportSettings.manualCleanupDescription: Delete all exports older than the retention period ({{days}} days)
exportSettings.confirmCleanupDescription: This will permanently delete all export files older than {{days}} days. This action cannot be undone.
exportSettings.manualActionsDescription: Generate exports or test email delivery
exportSettings.runWithConfig: Run the export immediately with {{state}} configuration
exportSettings.testEmailDeliveryDescription: Send a test email to verify delivery configuration

scheduler.masterDesc: Global switch for all automated background tasks.

schedulerSettings.systemPausedDescription: Audit loops, auto-exports, backups, and email alerts are currently suspended.
schedulerSettings.jobStatusDescription: Real-time status of scheduled background tasks
